chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-652 of 2023 Imran Ali Sikandar Versus IInd Additional District Judge Karachi East & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on Misc. No.3300/23 2. For hearing of main case Dated: 14.02.2024 None present. -.-.- None is present on behalf of the petitioner. Even on the last date of hearing no one was in attendance. There is no intimation either. It appears that the petitioner and his counsel have lost interest in the proceedings. Petition as such is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge
